articles.title: Austria Downgrade Ends Era in Club of Europe’s Safest Borrowers
articles.summary: Austria lost its last top credit score from a major assessor because of persistently high budget deficits, ending a decades-long streak as one of Europe’s best-rated issuers.

articles.title: Philippine Court Drops Remaining Marcos Ill-Gotten Wealth Case

articles.title: HKMA Says It’s Implemented New Bank Rules for Opening Accounts

articles.title: Second US Screwworm Case Confirmed in Texas by USDA
